subcodes.first_line: O thou who believest in God! When thy thirst rageth fierce in the desert of deprivation, hasten to the fountainhead of living waters [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مومن بالله چون در بیابان حرمان سورت عطشت اشتداد یافت بسرچشمه آب حیوان
subcodes.subjects: @realms of being; three realms; five realms, @living waters; water of life, @spiritual transformation, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life
